ddls:
CREATE TABLE "food_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each food item */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the food item */,
  "special" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the item is a special (predefined) item */,
  "customizable" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the item can be customized */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or description of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the food item */,
  "price" REAL /* Base price of the food item */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Number of calories in the food item */,
  "vegan" INTEGER /* Indicates if the item is vegan */,
  "gluten_free" INTEGER /* Indicates if the item is gluten-free */,
  "item_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the item */,
  "image" TEXT /* URL to the image of the item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_food_items_item_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_type_id") REFERENCES item_types ("item_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_types" (
  "item_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the food item type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the item type */,
  "image" TEXT /* URL to the image representing the item type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_customizations" (
  "customization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customization option */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the food item that can be customized */,
  "topping_name" TEXT /* Name of the topping or extra item */,
  "additional_cost" REAL /* Additional cost for the topping or extra item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the customization option */,
  "image" TEXT /* URL to the image representing the customization option */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customization option is selected by default */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_customizations_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES food_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order that the item belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the food item that was ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the food item that was ordered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES food_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer preference */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who has the preference */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the food item that the customer prefers */,
  "customization_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customization option that the customer prefers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_customization_id FOREIGN KEY ("customization_id") REFERENCES item_customizations ("customization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES food_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who is being recommended the item */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the food item that is being recommended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES food_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer's account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)
